boxDescription: In the engine compartment, there is a fuse block on the passenger side of the vehicle.

fuses.description: Sensing and Diagnostic Module/ Automatic Passenger Detection

boxDescription: The rear compartment fuse block is located at the rear of the vehicle, underneath the load floor. Lift the carpet and the access door in the center of the load floor to access the fuses.
